_comment: CONF-05 reconciliation: this annotated example is TRACKED at config/adman.example.json (tracked outside the gitignored .store/) because .store/ is gitignored and a shipped example must be tracked; the first-run wizard/init (00-03) emits the runtime .store/config.json (gitignored) FROM this same shared schema (D-04). Strict JSON has no comments, so '_comment' keys annotate each section and are stripped by the loader before validation (NOT JSONC/JSON5).
_comment_ManagedOUs: One or more DN roots the tool may mutate (SAFE-07). Component-boundary-anchored: a target DN must equal a root or end with ',<root>'. Empty in defaults.json so a fresh install fails closed (CONF-02); populate via the wizard.
_comment_DenyList: Hard floor of never-touch identities (SAFE-05), matched by objectSid/RID against (Get-ADDomain).DomainSID - never sAMAccountName (RID-500 is routinely renamed). token is a non-secret RID suffix (500/501/502) or a well-known SID literal (S-1-5-32-544). Seed is 'starter, not exhaustive'; extend in .store/config.json (D-05).

DenyList.note: example well-known SID literal - builtin Administrators group

_comment_safety: Scaled confirmation (SAFE-02). At/above bulkConfirmThreshold the operator must type the exact count (no Enter-to-accept). Default 5 (D-07).
_comment_bulk: maxCount is a placeholder cap; ENFORCEMENT is Phase 4 (BULK-02) and is NOT applied in Phase 0.
_comment_paths: AuditDir is local for fail-closed reliability (D-03); ReportDir holds generated CSV/HTML. Both relative to the tool root.
_comment_transport: Per-host remote-op fallback ladder (Phase 3) with short timeouts so a probe never hangs. WinRM -> CIM/WSMan -> CIM/DCOM -> Skip.
_comment_credentialPolicy: Non-secret metadata only. allowRememberMe gates the opt-in DPAPI remember-me flow (D-06); NO credential is stored in this file - the DPAPI blob is a separate .store/ file written only on explicit consent. Default false = pass-through.
_comment_AdmanProtectedGroup: DN of the admin-maintained adman-Protected group whose members (recursive) are never mutated (D-02). Empty until the team creates the group.
_comment_DC: Pinned domain-controller FQDN for -Server (Pitfall 1/6). Empty => resolved at startup.
_comment_delegatedAdminGroup: SID of the team delegated-admin group for the startup rights banner (MENU-05). Environment-specific; supplied by the team.
